mano_cua.result_summary: 删除功能正常。Step 1-6: 导航到 Dashboard，添加 Bar Chart 小部件（Test Tracker）。Step 7-9: 点击三点菜单，显示 Widget Options（Edit/Move/Duplicate/Delete）。Step 10: 点击 Delete Widget，弹出确认对话框。Step 11: 确认删除后小部件立即从仪表盘移除，布局正常更新。全流程无异常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Widget deletion successful. Dashboard updated immediately, returning to 4 widgets from 5. No functional issues found.
